name: ccal
description: Rappahannock Community Calendar — multi-org calendar aggregator

dokku.predeploy: bin/console importmap:install && bin/console asset-map:compile && bin/console secrets:decrypt-to-local --force && bin/console doctrine:migrations:migrate -n --allow-no-migration

WEB_CONCURRENCY.description: The number of PHP-FPM/web processes to run.
